scripts.restart:server: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const res = spawnSync('lsof', ['-tiTCP:3001', '-sTCP:LISTEN'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (res.status === 0 && res.stdout.trim()) { for (const pid of res.stdout.trim().split(/\s+/)) { try { process.kill(Number(pid), 'SIGTERM'); } catch {} } }" && npm run start:server
scripts.restart:dev: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const ports = ['3001', '5173']; for (const port of ports) { const res = spawnSync('lsof', ['-tiTCP:' + port, '-sTCP:LISTEN'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (res.status === 0 && res.stdout.trim()) { for (const pid of res.stdout.trim().split(/\s+/)) { try { process.kill(Number(pid), 'SIGTERM'); } catch {} } } }" && npm run dev
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" > combined.log 2>&1
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
